name: Protocol Name

usage.en: One-sentence description of what this protocol accomplishes.
usage.zh: 一句话描述此方案的目的。

components.name: Step 1: Brief description of what to do.

note.en: Optional English tip or detail for this step.
note.zh: 此步骤的可选中文提示或详细说明。

components.name: Step 2: Next action in the protocol.

stoppingPoints.condition: Storage condition if paused (e.g. -20°C in buffer)
stoppingPoints.duration: How long you can pause (e.g. overnight, 1 month)

notes.en: Troubleshooting, tips, critical success factors, or background information.
notes.zh: 故障排除、提示、关键成功因素或背景信息。
